changes.description: SQO artifact loader. Loads 8 artifact types per client/run from artifacts/sqo/ directory. Validates against manifest registry.
Fail-closed degradation handler. Assesses critical artifact availability. Builds degraded overlay shape with governance disclosure preserved.
7 overlay formatters for qualification banner, maturity panel, gravity/stability indicators, debt/progression summaries, runtime warnings. S-state lookup tables.
Main overlay orchestrator. Loads artifacts, assesses degradation, formats all 9 overlay sections. Single entry point: resolveSQOOverlays(client, runId).
Added SQO overlay integration. Imports SQOOverlayStateResolver, resolves overlays with fail-safe try/catch, adds sqoOverlays to all return paths.
Added 6 inline SQO overlay components (QualificationBanner, MaturityPanel, GravityStabilityPanel, DebtProgressionPanel, GovernanceStrip, RuntimeWarnings) with comprehensive CSS.
39 tests across 10 suites. Covers BlueEdge/FastAPI overlay rendering, degradation, binding integration, PATH B non-mutation, Q-class non-mutation, AI language absence, client-name branching absence.
